Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to act as if Im analyzing this process mining or event log data for anomalies I have reviewed the event logs and noticed several clear anomalies that deviate from the expected process flow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In case 1001 everything follows the normal sequence but case 1002 jumps straight from Register Order to Confirm Shipment without the Credit Check step and case 1003 skips Validate Stock entirely Case 1004 is especially problematic payment is received before any invoice is issued and both Credit Check and Stock Validation are completely missing

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: These patterns suggest either system errors eg missing steps in the workflow engine policy violations skipping mandatory checks or training issues staff bypassing required approvals

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: These patterns suggest either system errors eg missing steps in the workflow engine policy violations skipping mandatory checks or training issues staff bypassing required approvals

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: To investigate 1002 and 1003 further Id run queries that compare each cases activity sequence against the reference order and flag any skipped or out of sequence steps
